ariaSpec.usage: Sets the proper role for the group of buttons.
The attribute is rendered only when the entire button group is disabled.
Specifies the current state of the ButtonGroup. Only the selected button within the group will have this attribute set to true.

kbSpec.behavior: Focuses the next button in the group. If the focus is on the last button, focuses the next focusable element on the page.
Focuses the previous button in the group. If the focus is on the first button, focuses the previous focusable element before the ButtonGorup.
Triggers a click action on the button.
